purpose: Free-first helpful resources for families doing genealogy before allotment/map research. No paid partners are active in this version.

partners.name: FamilySearch
partners.label: Free resource
partners.description: Use FamilySearch to build a free family tree, gather names, spelling variants, relatives, dates, places, and record hints before searching Dawes, allotment, county, and land records.
partners.note: FamilySearch is an outside website with its own account, privacy, and use rules. AllottedLand.com does not control FamilySearch and does not send your search there unless you open the link.
